item.name: Baby Behemoth
item.description:
We can only hope his mother doesn't come looking for him.

Use item to acquire the baby behemoth minion.
item.tooltip:
Disaster follows the man
like a behemoth chasing
a butterfly.
  - Chechezan
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 230 to all enemies within range.
